---
title: "Geography and a Geographer"
subtitle: "Reimagining the Discipline After Ron Johnston"
author: "Richard Harris, David Manley, Robert Mayhew (eds.)"
date: "Published 2026"
output:
  tint::tintHtml
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{=html}
<div class="fullwidth" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
<div style="flex:1 1 320px; text-align:center;">
<img src="ron.jpg" width="260">
</div>
<span class="marginnote" style="float:none; width:auto; margin:0; flex:1 1 260px;"><em>Geography and a Geographer</em> speaks to the work and influence of a man who shaped, profoundly, the discipline he professed. Intellectually curious, always collegial, astonishingly productive and forward thinking about geography&rsquo;s past and present, Ron Johnston was geography&rsquo;s modest colossus. This book is a tribute and a clarion call for geography in better futures.<br><br>(Charles W. J. Withers, Professor Emeritus of Historical Geography, The University of Edinburgh)</span>
</div>
```

# Learn More
[About the book](https://press.lse.ac.uk/books/e/10.31389/lsepress.gag){target="_blank"} at the publisher's website

# Ron's Publication List

[Browse the searchable list of Ron's publications](publications.html){target="_blank"}

![](papers.jpg){width="800"}
